_comment: Provenance metadata for Karma Whip (因果鞭). Auto-generated from canon database. Every item answers: Where did this originate? Who made it? When? Why? How old? What cultivation? Current owner? Known history?

abilities: Once cleaved open 7 million worlds with a single whip-strike
